# llms.txt

This website is "滿願藏庫".

- Primary language: zh-Hant (Traditional Chinese)
- Purpose: Online landing pages for Buddhist wealth puja participation, with payment redirected to a third-party payment provider (ECPay).

## Key pages
- / (Home)
- /puja (Overview)
- /deities/yellow
- /deities/mahashri
- /deities/ganapati
- /deities/kurukulla
- /pay
- /sutra
- /proof
- /about
- /terms

## Notes
- The site content is informational and religious in nature.
- No sensitive personal data is collected directly on the site.
